footer.tagline: A game company powered by AI

hero.title: A game company that creates with
hero.description:
A solo indie studio building games with Claude AI.
Our first game 'Cosmic Daeng Guardians' launches November 2026.

about.title: AI-Native Game Studio
about.description: Codegenic is a solo indie game studio that uses AI as the core development tool. Founded in March 2026, we're crafting our first game.

ai.title: AI-First
ai.description: From design to code, we build everything together with Claude AI.

global.title: Global
global.description: Korean and English by default, crafting games for players worldwide.

indie.title: Indie Spirit
indie.description: The freedom of solo development to rapidly realize creative ideas.

game.title: Cosmic Daeng Guardians
game.description: Defend the universe with adorable space dogs! A hybrid casual game combining idle, tower defense, and gacha collection RPG.

defense.title: Tower Defense
defense.description: Strategically place your daengs and defend against enemy waves

collection.title: Gacha Collection
collection.description: Collect and upgrade daeng characters with unique abilities

idle.title: Space Walk (Idle)
idle.description: Auto-collect resources even while offline with idle mechanics

contact.title: Collaboration & Inquiries
contact.description: Open to collaboration proposals, media inquiries, or just a friendly hello.
